process_timeline.action: Repository clone and verification process started
Installed basic build dependencies (GCC, CMake, Python)
Downloaded and extracted CANN AMCT graph packages
Build failed due to missing securec.h from CANN toolkit
UT build failed due to missing PyTorch

build.error_summary: Build failed at 43% progress due to missing securec.h header file from CANN toolkit

ut.note: UT build requires PyTorch which could not be installed due to network timeouts

sample.reason: Build must succeed before samples can be run

documentation_gaps: Repository does not provide Dockerfile or container image definition
No explicit mention that securec.h comes from base CANN toolkit (not amctgraph packages)
Build documentation assumes CANN toolkit is pre-installed but doesn't clearly state this as a hard requirement
No troubleshooting guide for missing securec.h error
No information about building without NPU hardware (if possible)
PyTorch installation command in requirements.txt doesn't specify CPU-only version for non-GPU systems

problems_encountered.problem: Missing securec.h header file during build
problems_encountered.error_message: fatal error: securec.h: No such file or directory
problems_encountered.solution_attempted: Searched in amctgraph packages - securec.h is not included
problems_encountered.root_cause: securec.h is part of the base CANN toolkit which must be installed separately at ASCEND_HOME_PATH
problems_encountered.resolution: Cannot resolve without installing full CANN toolkit (requires NPU hardware and drivers)
problems_encountered.source: CMakeLists.txt references ASCEND_HOME_PATH for CANN dependencies

problems_encountered.root_cause: Network connectivity issues to PyPI from container environment
problems_encountered.resolution: Unresolved - would require proxy configuration or offline package installation

problems_encountered.problem: Git safe.directory issue with cmake FetchContent
problems_encountered.error_message: fatal: detected dubious ownership in repository at '/workspace/build/_deps/cann-cmake-src'
problems_encountered.root_cause: Git security feature blocking cmake FetchContent operations
problems_encountered.resolution: Resolved by running: git config --global --add safe.directory /workspace/build/_deps/cann-cmake-src

problems_encountered.error_message: CMake Warning: Manually-specified variables were not used by the project: ASCEND_HOME_PATH
problems_encountered.solution_attempted: Downloaded amctgraph packages but these don't include base CANN headers
problems_encountered.root_cause: AMCT build requires full CANN toolkit installation, not just AMCT-specific packages
problems_encountered.resolution: Requires installation of Ascend-cann-toolkit package (not available without NPU hardware)
problems_encountered.source: docs/quick_install.md - '安装驱动与固件' and '安装CANN包' sections

for_users: AMCT requires Huawei Ascend NPU hardware and CANN toolkit to build
Install CANN Toolkit (>= 8.5.0) before attempting to build AMCT
Install NPU drivers and firmware as documented in CANN software installation guide
Set ASCEND_HOME_PATH environment variable to point to CANN installation
For CPU-only systems, consider using pre-built wheels from amctgraph if available
for_maintainers: Consider providing a Dockerfile with CANN toolkit pre-installed for easier testing
Add clear error messages when ASCEND_HOME_PATH is not set or CANN is not installed
Document the securec.h dependency and where it comes from
Provide a CPU-only build mode that skips NPU-specific components
Add troubleshooting section for common build failures

hardware_requirements_summary.npu: Huawei Ascend NPU required for full functionality
hardware_requirements_summary.build_without_npu: Not possible - CANN toolkit headers (securec.h) are required for compilation
